productDisplayName: Wildcraft Unisex Blue & Black Laptop Backpack
description: Blue and black laptop backpackOne padded handle on the top, two adjustable and padded shoulder strapsTwo main zip compartments, one has a padded laptop sleeve secured with Velcro closure, the other has an organiser sleeveOne external zip pocket on the front, has adjustable tabs on either side secured with a click claspA mesh stash pocket on either sideEco-friendly, PVC-free, recyclableWarranty: 18 months from the date of purchase against manufacturing defectsDisclaimer: Please note that the thread colour in the brand logo may vary from the image shownNote: The inner lining material/colour may vary from what is shown in the image
